'''Jabidus Inspra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Jabidus Inspra attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] after years of study. When the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] threatened to tear the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] apart in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Master Inspra, alongside Master [[Ashka Boda]] and five [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were assigned by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to investigate reports on the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]] and identify [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], who had visited area shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].<ref name="HNN54" />
